query:
INSERT INTO queries (
  userId, query, response, tier, complexityScore, confidenceScore,
  qualityScore, completenessScore, accuracyScore, relevanceScore, coherenceScore, safetyScore,
  responseTime, tokensUsed, cost, cacheHit
) VALUES (
  1, 
  'What is 2+2?', 
  '2+2 equals 4',
  'gpt-4o-mini',
  '0.3',
  '0.95',
  '95',
  '90',
  '100',
  '100',
  '100',
  '100',
  250,
  50,
  '0.0005',
  0
), (
  1,
  'Explain quantum computing',
  'Quantum computing uses quantum mechanics...',
  'gpt-4o',
  '0.7',
  '0.85',
  '89',
  '85',
  '95',
  '90',
  '90',
  '100',
  3155,
  474,
  '0.001253',
  0
), (
  1,
  'Write a complex algorithm',
  'Here is a sophisticated algorithm...',
  'gpt-4',
  '0.9',
  '0.75',
  '92',
  '95',
  '90',
  '90',
  '95',
  '100',
  5200,
  1200,
  '0.015',
  0
);
